h898f8207g982eg4659ga379g13bca7485193: Any of the lads give you trouble, they'll answer to me.
h3681912cg957dg4877ga10eg2e5d52a84ae2: You see anythin' shiny, it's ours.
h2400a6ccgcb1fg4a09g9556gc10e5f32f37d: I know you're there. Show yourselves.
hd00384bfg1ebcg4263g9386gd257b0939749: You spotted us. Good. S'like they say...
h8fba19d5g9c66g425bgad87gf0fd25a42217: No fun in skewerin' a pig what doesn't know he's cooked.
he4282bdbgaac5g472dg9c78g3fd2926993fe: There'll be no skewering happening here. Now let me pass.
h3c517967gf6d5g45b0g8f56ga0132eba5ff8: Here's how this goes: you take one step further an' we'll fill your front with arrows.
h5455cc96gb36bg446fgb886g1c8b6463be22: Or you turn around, an' your backside gets the same treatment.
h35a7c8b5g5f4fg4db5gb3ccgd4899a57dab4: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
he9438dbdg8e75g4205g859fgf77c8ccd4677: Out of my way, or I'll cut you down first.
h1538ee41gaf46g4d4dg9b4dgea39fe9151c9: Hold up, lads! This one might be more'n we bargained for.
hb5916fadg9c97g4f3dgbb76g081e7356cdca: Go on then. Just keep your nose clean.
h12896c1ag41c1g4279gb078g3ad1eaf9d13d: I'd like to see you try.
h1f10b255ge126g4590g82a8g4b835f17366f: Either you stand aside, or I go right through you.
h0a7662d3ge71dg4192g944bga906b1293be1: Just let me by and we'll pretend this never happened.
hc65a2c4eg4a67g451cga69ag2e4e3d84485e: Erh... S'pose it's best to save our strength for a real threat.
h3b4a197cg84fbg4667g9882g69737ee07fa9: Here's what I'm thinkin' - we kill you, an' I keep your ears to remember the occasion.
h8bdba948g4796g47f3gb297gf9b5195774d8: Gut's lettin' just anyone join these days, huh?
hc8ee35cega245g455fg855eg73fb633ece7d: This ought to be fun. Lads!
h7c6befffg3df4g4fe7gbfc3g43d2a9992775: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
h47c91c40gefc9g4083ga7efgcdfee29b2328: You're a True Soul... M-my mistake, sir.
hf4142b05g548fg4ac5g915cg33d8ebecebc0: You're a True Soul... M-my mistake, madame.
h01e80ed7g7641g4645g8f93g6caad25cfe6a: *A shiver runs across your mind... you feel sated.*
h9820591dg65bag4c91g8321g083d498d5c75: You'll get no more trouble from us, promise.
h5f8e9d60g5fd8g4879g9e93gd0b897dd16d6: *Something stirs deep within you, hungry and alert... it's taking something you'll never get back.*
h8895c27ag6907g4b39g9c65gb6dab7cdca94: *Your mind lurches, reeling suddenly as if... bitten.*
h5e467a2fgc740g4348g8d52g6951e1e6a2c8: *A shadow swims across your vision, and a familiar voice tells you to be calm. You are loved.*
h70139961g47f3g41f5gb444gfc49be10677a: *Your blood runs quicker, feeding the gnawing absence at the centre of your mind.*
h4bac94f4ge87dg46cdgb437g8477e56d5897: *The presence deep in your mind is awake, unblinking. This is it. A single word pervades your consciousness: 'Soon'.*
h266fa194g1a92g4967ga077g988459da702e: *Your mind is full, bursting with ecstasy and terror. Finally, it is coming. You are becoming.*
h5020adeag3518g4586g8d3fgfaa30956b46a: Looks like we got ourselves another brave one. Lads! You know what to do.
h41c539f5g97d7g4723gb248gfa3386558e02: *As the symbol glows, power courses through you. Authority.*
hff862e9eg4e41g4fb5g999eg70246469e55c: An' I didn't want to be stuck moppin' up nosy trespassers like you.
h57da7b3cga83fg4c2dgac97g429ec14f28d8: Ain't no one gettin' their way today.
hb9d25a5egcacbg46edgbc6bg3f2afb7b38fc: Curious. I had almost the exact same thought when I saw you.
ha862fdbbgf24dg4d8agb2ebgd87521711442: That supposed to be a threat?
h6503eed4g903fg4f41g8cbeg968539aee383: Got a set on you, all right. Almost makes me like you.
h68cea45eg1d1dg4e9egb752g0feb52feb7c0: Almost. I'm gonna enjoy pullin' off your skin when we're done.
ha842af89gbc97g4107g9240g785a28489abc: Oi! You just walked into the wrong town.
h62b896c6g0ac2g4efcgbe56ged6259ef1e5b: Wait - a drow? In the sun?
hf476bbbdg602cg4749g825fg5655b294b154: Stand down! This one's got a touch of the Absolute about her.
he96a5579gc22cg4379gbf50gace5c165fdf9: Stand down! This one's got a touch of the Absolute about him.
h5f2df6bcg78bag4b6fg9912g6c934378d242: Apologies, your lordship. Hard makin' you out from a distance.
hbb8c8fbag73c3g4e30g8806g1234f5e9badd: O-of course. Come and go as you as you like.
h3f999e99g326cg4dc5g8e42gf350be48f089: Move it, lads! And show some respect!
h736b9223g43dbg4d32gaacdg623c79954923: I should pluck out your eyes. You're clearly not using them.
h063d76f8ge7beg44e8ga23dg0ff1db67b0dd: Please, your greatness. Was an honest mistake, is all.
h777119degb61eg467bga787gdfb6dd76b52c: It'll take more than an apology. Your head will suffice.
h9753a6cdg822bg4b02gb82cgba97330c2110: Y'know, no one said nothin' about a drow coming through.
h1a309136g50cag48a7gb0a5g34426daf036e: Meanin' you ain't one of us. Change of plans, lads! Kill 'em!
h01c629b1g0ad8g4496gbda9g1c4ada55adb6: Don't bother runnin'. My archers got decent aim and plenty of arrows.
h3bdea0e3g19a1g4613g84cbg3cce2d1c10e0: *The mark glows, but you feel nothing in response. Your illithid power is beyond reach until you rest.*
h87d2f56fg0b2fg4e30gb7adg4e42ef866e69: I'm not running, and their aim's not good enough to save you.
hb0be8bc0gb7f6g411agb3cbga373e4fc306c: Spare them the trouble and just let me pass - I'll be gone in no time.
h1bd2b7bbgadacg4d3fg908ag5cbb9d1d08b0: *A strange symbol glows, marked on their flesh, and something within you stirs in response.*
hbbb4566fgfeb9g41f9ga38dgaec36242e6c8: *As the symbol glows, power courses through you. Authority.*
h2c1c980cg231cg40fbgbbfag242b709fad6d: Come here and face me, you pack of gibbering snot-rags!
h5106cc5egb7f6g4882g8342g11d1af426c20: What, you think we was just gonna let you slip by?
h18f31d6bg81b4g4996g9813g0ba003386c97: Y'know, I hear we got one like you roastin' back at camp.
he3ad72cfg5dcfg4f52g8ad6g3e64c29db10e: Don't seem fair for the lads to miss out. Bet we'd get some nice cuts out of you.
h690bdc1fge808g4d42g8ae2g3a7e8e94a889: I reckon my meat's too tough for runty goblin fangs.
h41586f90gbd62g4f46gb9dbg762b6df2d820: This one's got jokes! Almost makes me like her.
h206f2022g205bg441agb4e1g4ff5202e19cf: This one's got jokes! Almost makes me like 'im.
h3151ccaegef03g45ebg8894gdb1ab17a8475: Well, well, boys. Looks like we got ourselves a trespasser.
